# Generalization, Model Selection, and Fit {#ch-generalization}

::: epigraph
Torture the data, and it will confess to anything.

*Ronald Coase*
:::

<!-- DEVELOPMENT OUTLINE: original chapter contained only its title and epigraph. -->

## Training Performance and Generalization

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/15-generalization-model-selection-and-fit.qmd#sec-pr-15-training-performance-and-generalization)
to turn **Training Performance and Generalization** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Bias, Variance, and Model Capacity

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/15-generalization-model-selection-and-fit.qmd#sec-pr-15-bias-variance-and-model-capacity)
to turn **Bias, Variance, and Model Capacity** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Validation and Cross-Validation

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/15-generalization-model-selection-and-fit.qmd#sec-pr-15-validation-and-cross-validation)
to turn **Validation and Cross-Validation** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Regularization

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/15-generalization-model-selection-and-fit.qmd#sec-pr-15-regularization)
to turn **Regularization** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Learning Curves and Diagnostics

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/15-generalization-model-selection-and-fit.qmd#sec-pr-15-learning-curves-and-diagnostics)
to turn **Learning Curves and Diagnostics** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Hyperparameter Selection Without Leakage

<!-- practice-link:start -->
::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="Put it into practice"}
Continue with [the corresponding practice activity](../practice/15-generalization-model-selection-and-fit.qmd#sec-pr-15-hyperparameter-selection-without-leakage)
to turn **Hyperparameter Selection Without Leakage** into a calculation,
implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or interpretation task.
:::
<!-- practice-link:end -->

## Summary, Exercises, and Lab

Under- and over-fitting\...

Bias, variance, and error\...

Combined, ensemble learning\...
